subject: Re: no chile
body:
so.. what do you think of the letter on the whole? This is very scary, but I see that they keep contacting students, postdocs etc, and are
not letting up.. I really need your feedback.
will talk tomorrow.. on plane now.

subject: Re: no chile
body:
have cancelled my flight to chile.. did so while on way to jfk and found a flight to portland at the same time.. will be home tonight.. can we talk tomorrow?

---
